# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for VPC, subnets, route tables, internet gateway and NAT gateways
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        Name: vpc-microservices

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties: {}

  NatGateway1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateways
    DependsOn: InternetGateway
    Properties:
      AllocatePublicIp: true

  RouteTablePublic:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      RouteTableAssociations:
        - Ref: SubnetPrivate1
        - Ref: SubnetPrivate2

  RouteTableAssociationPublic:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      VpcGatewayRouteTableId: !GetAtt RouteTablePublic.Id
      RouteTableId: !Ref SubnetPublic1
      RouteTableId: !Ref SubnetPublic2

  SubnetPublic1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a
      Tags:
        Name: subnet-public-us-west-2a

  SubnetPublic2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.64/26
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2b
      Tags:
        Name: subnet-public-us-west-2b

  SubnetPrivate1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a
      Tags:
        Name: subnet-private-us-west-2a

  SubnetPrivate2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.64/26
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2b
      Tags:
        Name: subnet-private-us-west-2b

  RouteTablePrivate1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      RouteTableAssociations:
        - Ref: SubnetPrivate1

  RoutePrivateInternetAccess1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: NatGateway1
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTablePrivate1
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !GetAtt NatGateway1.Id

  RoutePrivateInternetAccess2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: NatGateway1
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTablePrivate2
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !GetAtt NatGateway1.Id
